summary: Completed testing of batch PO split refactoring. All features working correctly: batch split uses real AI pipeline (not demo shortcut), batch_parent docs excluded from both active inbox AND Processed tab, Vendor/Customer column correctly reads extracted_fields.customer showing 'Giovanni Food Company'. Fixed minor bug where Processed tab badge showed incorrect count (22 instead of 5) by excluding batch_parent from completed_count calculation.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing batch split job '3162246957db' from previous run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch PO split refactoring fully tested. The demo shortcut was replaced with split_and_ingest_batch() which runs each split page through the full AI pipeline (classify, extract, validate, route, auto-assign). Job '3162246957db' completed successfully with 5 child documents, all assigned to Lisa Chen with auto_approved status. batch_parent docs (17 total) are correctly excluded from both active inbox and Processed tab. Vendor/Customer column reads from extracted_fields.customer. Fixed bug in completed_count calculation to exclude batch_parent docs.
